ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* A brief description of the project */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country code of the project's origin */,
  "country_displayable_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country where the project is based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the project's funding goal and pledges */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency used for the project */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the project's funding period */,
  "disable_communication" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if communication with backers is disabled */,
  "goal" REAL /* Funding goal of the project in the specified currency */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project (same as project_id) */,
  "is_starrable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the project can be starred by users */,
  "launched_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was launched */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Total amount pledged to the project in the specified currency */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the project is featured on the platform */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the project is selected by staff */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current state of the project (e.g., successful, failed, canceled) */,
  "state_changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project's state was last changed */,
  "static_usd_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate from the project's currency to USD at the time of project creation */,
  "usd_pledged" REAL /* Total amount pledged to the project in USD */,
  "main_cat" TEXT /* Main category of the project */,
  "sub_cat" TEXT /* Subcategory of the project */,
  "loc_name" TEXT /* Name of the location where the project is based */,
  "loc_state" TEXT /* State of the location where the project is based */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator of the project */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Name of the creator of the project */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the project */,
  "update_count" INTEGER /* Total number of updates posted by the creator */,
  "milestone_1" TEXT /* Description of the first milestone */,
  "milestone_2" TEXT /* Description of the second milestone */,
  "milestone_3" TEXT /* Description of the third milestone */,
  "milestone_4" TEXT /* Description of the fourth milestone */,
  "milestone_5" TEXT /* Description of the fifth milestone */,
  "funding_received" REAL /* Total amount of funding received so far */,
  "funding_remaining" REAL /* Total amount of funding still needed to meet the goal */,
  "funding_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the funding goal that has been met */,
  "backer_count" INTEGER /* Total number of backers for the project */,
  "backer_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments from backers */,
  "backer_ratings" REAL /* Average rating given by backers (on a scale of 1-5) */,
  "project_video_url" TEXT /* URL to the project's video */,
  "project_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the project's main image */,
  "project_document_url" TEXT /* URL to any additional project documents (e.g., business plan, design sketches) */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the project has been verified by the platform */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of the verification process (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, backer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "total_backed_projects" INTEGER /* Total number of projects the user has backed */,
  "total_created_projects" INTEGER /* Total number of projects the user has created */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio or description of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the user's personal or professional website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the user's social media profiles (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "is_email_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's email is verified */,
  "is_phone_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's phone number is verified */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* JSON object containing the user's notification preferences (e.g., email, SMS, push notifications) */,
  "total_pledged" REAL /* Total amount of money the user has pledged across all projects */,
  "total_received" REAL /* Total amount of money the user has received as a creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
